summary: production runtime polls only once and stops before normal long-running provider completion

findings.detail: Add a bounded timeout-aware same-dispatch polling loop and multi-poll plus timeout containment regressions.

inspection.summary: Runtime owner, adapter, production connector lifecycle, HEAD authority, decisions, repair and focused tests inspected.
inspection.evidence: focused 183 tests passed; production status is an immediate snapshot while owner performs only one poll

judgment_delta: authority contracts passed, but a single immediate poll cannot satisfy one-command production execution
